project_description: Mobile app iOS + Android for managing phone subscription. Biometric login, balance and invoice view, top-ups, tariff plan change, customer support chat, push notifications. React Native, integration with operator's REST API backend, Apple Pay / Google Pay for payments.
client_history: Operator had no mobile app before — first implementation.
risk_patterns: First mobile app for client — no internal review processes and store submission. +25%.
pm_comment: Delays in configuring Apple Developer Program and Google Play Console.
